instruction: There's a stray red side stripe on the document currency yen icon. Remove it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/document-currency-yen.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m1.5 9 2.25 3m0 0 2.25-3m-2.25 3v4.5M9.75 15h4.5m-4.5 2.25h4.5m-3.75-15H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="12" y="16" width="4" height="96" />
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="12" y="16" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
